sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7402" key="a)na/rriyis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνάρριψις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n7402.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throwing up,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πετρῶν,</foreign> of a volcano, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.398e</biblScope></bibl>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> l. ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">951c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
